message:
feat: implement block I/O engine, expand MVCC subsystem, and add btrfs on-disk layout

Major infrastructure expansion across four crates bringing frankenfs closer
to a functional filesystem implementation:

Block I/O (ffs-block):
- io_engine.rs: Add asynchronous block I/O engine with scatter-gather
  support, submission queue batching, and completion notification
- lib.rs: Expand block layer abstractions with device geometry, block
  allocation bitmaps, extent-based mapping, and I/O priority levels;
  add block cache with LRU eviction and dirty tracking

Core (ffs-core):
- Add new dependency in Cargo.toml for expanded core functionality
- Expand core type definitions with superblock structures, inode
  metadata, directory entry formats, extended attribute support,
  journal transaction records, and filesystem-wide configuration

MVCC (ffs-mvcc):
- compression.rs: Add transparent compression for versioned pages
  (LZ4/zstd selection with adaptive threshold based on page entropy)
- lib.rs: Extend MVCC coordinator with snapshot isolation, read/write
  conflict detection, and garbage collection scheduling
- rcu.rs: Add Read-Copy-Update primitive for lock-free concurrent
  readers with grace period tracking and callback batching
- sharded.rs: Add sharded lock manager for fine-grained page-level
  concurrency with deadlock detection via wait-for graph analysis
- wal.rs: Add Write-Ahead Log with group commit, log sequence number
  tracking, checkpoint coordination, and crash recovery replay

On-disk layouts (ffs-ondisk):
- btrfs.rs: Implement btrfs on-disk format parsing including superblock,
  chunk tree, extent tree, B-tree node traversal, and RAID stripe
  mapping for multi-device configurations
- ext4.rs: Significantly expand ext4 implementation with extent tree
  parsing, journal (JBD2) replay, directory hash tree (htree) lookup,
  large file support, and metadata checksum verification

Repair (ffs-repair):
- lrc.rs: Fix LRC (Longitudinal Redundancy Check) calculation edge
  cases for partial-stripe recovery scenarios

Tracking: Update beads issue tracker with progress on related items

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
